title: Calculating size of object of a class

source.submodule: What is OOPs / Features of OOPs

topicTags: What is OOPs / Features of OOPs

constraints:
- $1 \leq T \leq 100$
- $1 \leq N \leq 100$
- $1 \leq M \leq N\cdot(N-1)/2$
- $1 \leq u_i, v_i \leq N$
- $u_i \neq v_i$ for each $1 \leq i \leq M$.
- The sum of $N$ over all test cases won't exceed $100$.
content.inputFormat: The first line of input will contain a string and integer representing name and age respectively.
content.outputFormat: Use display method to print the name and age of Student.
